title: Wave-2 🔴: internal admin ×6 — non-admin(valid session) 404 existence-hiding, admin 200 + axe
acceptance_criteria: Covers all 6 internal pages: internal/users, internal/cron, internal/features, internal/fp-rates, internal/dispositions, internal/scans/[id].

Existence-hiding: a VALID authenticated NON-admin session (seeded non-admin user, NOT anonymous) requesting each internal page receives a 404 that is indistinguishable from a non-existent route (assert status/markup parity, not 403). The anonymous case is also asserted, but the load-bearing assertion is the authenticated-non-admin one.
Admin path: a seeded user whose email === 'e2e-admin@vibesafe.test' (matching ADMIN_EMAILS in webServer.env) receives 200 and the admin view renders for each page.

Admin user creation/teardown is isolated to THIS file's beforeAll/afterAll with a distinct admin storageState (never a global seed); non-admin user is a separate dedicated user; both cleaned in afterAll.
internal.a11y.spec.ts (R3): axe on the admin (200) views post-stable-state, scoped, WCAG A+AA, @functional, logged allow-list.
Single-tagged per qa-checklist.md; npm run typecheck passes; lists under playwright.
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of why the non-admin-404 test uses a valid authenticated session
